basic_details.job_title: Central Bank of India Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Incharge of FLCC Posts
basic_details.short_information: Central Bank of India (CBI) Incharge of FLCC Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of Central Bank of India. Have been announced through the CBI Incharge of FLCC Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 45 years Maximum Age: 64 years

qualification.details: Incharge FLCC Sagar & Incharge FLCC Narsinghpur: Graduate in any discipline from a recognized university; Computer literate – proficient in basic MS Office, internet, and typing in local language; Minimum 10 years experience as officer/permanent employee; Retired / VRS opted officers of Scale I and above from Nationalized Banks / SBI / RRBs preferred.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Central Bank of India Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 20-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Incharge of FLCC posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the Incharge of FLCC posts is 20th May 2026. Candidates are strongly advised to submit their applications well in advance of this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates must be graduates in any discipline from a recognized university. Additionally, they should be computer literate, proficient in basic MS Office, internet, and typing in the local language.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Incharge of FLCC positions?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement is 45 years, and the maximum age limit is 64 years for all the posts mentioned in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Incharge of FLCC role?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 25,000/- per month for the Incharge of FLCC positions.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and submit it via post or as specified in the official notification.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Incharge of FLCC posts?
faq.answer: The selection of candidates for the Incharge of FLCC posts will be based on a Personal Interview.

faq.question: Q8. Which locations are covered under this recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is for Incharge FLCC Sagar in Sagar, Madhya Pradesh, and Incharge FLCC Narsinghpur.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The positions of Incharge of FLCC are on a contract basis.
